clients.name: AIA Group
clients.blurb: Largest independent pan-Asian life insurer; HKEX-listed, US$328bn total assets.

clients.name: Shinhan Financial Group
clients.blurb: Korea's largest financial holding group by assets, KRX & NYSE dual-listed.

clients.name: Sumitomo Mitsui Trust
clients.blurb: Japan's largest trust bank; ~US$1tn in total assets, manages Nikko Asset Mgmt.

clients.name: Japan Post Bank
clients.blurb: One of the world's largest deposit banks; ¥229tn AUM, partially gov-owned.

clients.name: Temasek Holdings
clients.blurb: Singapore state investment company; S$434bn net portfolio as of FY2025.

clients.name: GIC
clients.blurb: Manages Singapore's foreign reserves; one of the world's largest SWFs.

clients.name: China Investment Corp.
clients.blurb: China's sovereign wealth fund managing overseas reserves; ~US$1.3tn AUM.

clients.name: Korea Investment Corp.
clients.blurb: Korea's sovereign wealth fund; manages MOEF & BOK assets.

clients.name: Hostplus
clients.blurb: Australian industry super fund; A$130bn+ FUM.

clients.name: TCorp
clients.blurb: NSW Treasury Corp; central financing & investment arm for NSW gov.

clients.name: Nippon Life Insurance
clients.blurb: Japan's largest private life insurer (mutual); ¥80tn+ in total assets.

clients.name: FWD Group
clients.blurb: Pan-Asian life insurer backed by Richard Li; 10+ markets, ~US$80bn AUM.

clients.name: Norinchukin Bank
clients.blurb: Central cooperative bank for Japan's agriculture & fishery coops; ¥100tn+.
